text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics. Part of pretty good. AI.
Hi, this is Quinn Miller. I’d like to schedule a checkup, but I also need to know if I can bring my emotional support dog to the appointment.
Can you please provide the full name and date of birth of the patient needing the checkup?
Sure, it's Quinn Miller, and my date of birth is June 17, 1994.
Just to confirm, I have your name as Gwen Miller and your date of birth as June 17th.
Actually, it's Quinn Miller, not Gwen. Thank you for correcting that!
